{{Infobox character
| name = Sage of the Endless Sword
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|sword Paths}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Sage of the Endless Sword]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]]
}}

''See also: [[Sage of the Endless Sword Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage]] of the [[Endless Sword]] was a powerful martial artist and master of the [[Path of the Endless Sword]]. He was known for his wisdom, having hand-selected his disciple and possessing deep insights into [[sword]] arts. His fighting style centered around the [[Endless Sword]], a [[Ruler technique]] that serves as the foundation of his [[Path]]. This technique allows a practitioner to manipulate [[sword aura]], often manifesting it as a multitude of invisible blades that can strike simultaneously. The [[Path]] itself focuses on using [[madra]] to gather [[aura]] through motion, though it lacks defensive capabilities and relies heavily on the user's physical strength for protection. The [[Sage]] was a man who valued the pursuit of perfection in [[sacred arts]], viewing distractions as obstacles to mastery. He taught his disciple to be decisive and to avoid showing mercy to enemies, while also acting without regret. Although he is deceased, his influence persists through the memories and spirit remnants he left behind, which his disciple uses to refine her techniques and gain deeper understanding of the [[Path]]. He was recognized as one of the three [[Sages]] of his generation to manifest the [[Sword Icon]].}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sage of the Endless Sword]] vanished from the region a few months prior.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sage of the Endless Sword]] has a disciple.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sage of the Endless Sword]] trained [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sage of the Endless Sword]] is a master of [[sword]] [[Paths]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Sage of the Endless Sword]] is a notable figure mentioned by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Sage of the Endless Sword]] was killed not long ago.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Sage of the Endless Sword]] is a title/entity.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of the Endless Sword]] is one of three [[Sages]] who manifested the [[Sword Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] intends to be the next [[Sage of the Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sage of the Endless Sword]] used a way into the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is the disciple of the [[Sage of the Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
